sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime64(3), event_name String);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, 'America/New_York') WHERE event_name = 'Test Event';
SELECT event_name, fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, 'Europe/London') AS local_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_name, fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64(event_time, 3), 'Asia/Tokyo') FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > '2023-03-16 00:00:00';
